title: AITA for reading my sister's texts out loud at my wedding?
script: Three days before my wedding, my maid of honor asked to see my dress one last time. She's my younger sister, so of course I said yes. What I didn't know was that she'd been screenshotting every detail and sending it to my fiance's ex. The morning of the wedding, I walked into the venue and there she was, standing at the altar in a nearly identical white dress, smiling at me like nothing was wrong. My sister just shrugged and said the ex deserved to feel included. My mother called me dramatic for ruining the family peace, and half the guests took her side. So I stood up, grabbed the microphone, and read the texts out loud to the entire room. My sister went pale. Turns out my fiance had saved every single message she ever sent him.

shots.phrase: sending it to my fiance's ex
standing at the altar in a nearly identical white dress
saved every single message she ever sent him
